message:
feat: Add production hardening and prefix cache optimization

## Production Hardening (Phase 5)
- Add structured logging system (logger.zig)
  - Thread-safe logging with mutex protection
  - Configurable log levels (debug, info, warn, error)
  - Optional file output with automatic directory creation
  - Global logger instance for easy access

## Performance Optimization (Phase 1)
- Add prefix cache for KV cache reuse
  - Hash-based prefix detection (Wyhash on first 32 tokens)
  - Zero-copy KV cache sharing via llama_memory_seq_cp
  - LRU tracking with last_used timestamp
  - sharePrefixAcrossCells() for batch processing

## llama.zig Additions
- Add getMemory() to get llama_memory_t handle
- Add memoryCopySeq() wrapper for llama_memory_seq_cp
- Enables incremental KV cache computation

## scheduler.zig Enhancements
- Add prefix_cache HashMap to Scheduler struct
- Implement hashTokenPrefix() for fast prefix matching
- Implement sharePrefixAcrossCells() for zero-copy sharing
- Modify submit() to check and populate prefix cache
- Add cache hit/miss logic with logging

## Bug Fixes
- Fix variable shadowing in logger.zig (|err| -> |e|)
- Use std.debug.print instead of non-existent std.io.getStdErr()
- Fix llama_kv_memory type error (use llama_memory_t)

This implements Wizer-style prefix caching for system prompts and
enables KV cache sharing across multiple cells for batch processing.
